name: Glutenberger Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour boiling water over the dry ground TVP®. Stir until all the water is absorbed.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for about 40 minutes, or until solid on top.
6. Remove from the oven using a spatula. Gently lift the sides of the dish with the spatula.
7. Invert the dish onto a large platter and slice to serve.
8. Serve immediately. Optionally, serve with brown gravy.
